title.en: Ye Tian had a doubt in his heart.

content.en:
Then.

Ye Tian had a doubt in his heart.

"Lord of the Yuan Extreme, why didn't the Lord of Chaos join Fengya Island and go to the central part?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Yuanji said slightly: "I just heard about it, it may not be true." It is rumored that the Lord of Chaos once joined Fengya Island and even went to the central part of the country, but for some reason he came back from the middle part and never went out again. The Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm said that the Lord of Taichao may have offended the strong and did not dare to step into the central part again, and he was afraid of affecting Fengya Island, so he had been hiding in the Taichao Domain and not going out. Of course, some people say that the Lord of Taichao is injured, and he is currently healing in the Taichao Domain, and he will return to the central part sooner or later. In short, there are all kinds of rumors. "

In this way, the Lord of Chaos is also a member of Wind Tooth Island.

As for whether it has really broken away from Wind Tooth Island, then I can't be sure.

In short, Fengya Island is indeed strong.

And according to what the Lord of the Yuan Ji said, if you want to join Fengya Island, you also have to participate in the assessment.

Not all other side level geniuses need to be on Wind Tooth Island, and even if ordinary other side level geniuses join Wind Tooth Island, it will not be of much help to Wind Tooth Island.

After all, there is no shortage of ordinary Other-level geniuses on Wind Tooth Island.

I don't know how many other shore-level geniuses have been trapped in the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and they can't break through in their eternal lives, and in the end they are depressed, completely sinking, and become a waste material, and it is not without such a shore-level genius.

After all, there are some big forces, relying on their background, they can stubbornly pile up a genius at the other side, and the achievements of this kind of genius may not even be as good as a powerful primeval-level genius!

The Lord of the Yuan Pole was not a genius of the other side, because he didn't know more details.

But it's true that the Eternal Night Pavilion can't buy the source stone on the other side now!

In desperation, Ye Tian could only leave.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian came to find the Lord of Eternal Zero, and wanted to learn more about Wind Tooth Island from the Lord of Eternal Zero.

Soon, he chatted with the Lord of Eternal Zero.

At this time, Ye Tian asked directly, "Lord of Eternal Zero, do you know about Wind Tooth Island?"

"Wind Tooth Island, naturally you know, why did you suddenly ask this?" the Lord of Eternal Zero asked curiously.

"I heard that Wind Tooth Island was going to recruit new geniuses from the other side, so I was curious to ask. Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Wind Tooth Island wants to recruit new geniuses from the other side? "

Subsequently.

He summoned a few of his old friends to inquire about the situation.

It didn't take long for him to know the exact news.

"Endless Lord, it's really true, but this time there are only thirty-six other level geniuses on Wind Tooth Island, so the competition is still very fierce!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero.

"Lord of Eternal Zero, what is the assessment of Wind Tooth Island?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The Lord of Eternal Zero said: "The assessment of Fengya Island is different every time, it depends on how they plan, and it is impossible for us to know now. But one thing is certain, that is, the higher the cultivation, the stronger the strength, the better. Basically, every session of the other side level genius who can join Wind Tooth Island is nine times the bone transformation realm, and the other side level genius who is seven or eight times the bone transformation realm is basically hopeless. "

Then he asked, "Lord of Infinity, do you want to join Stormtooth Island?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

At this time, the Lord of Eternal Zero frowned: "Lord of Endless, you are now in the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm, if you want to join Wind Tooth Island, it is impossible for the Mountain Lord and other Deputy Mountain Lords to take out the source stones on the other side to cultivate you." "

"I'm worried that I'll leave Guheng Mountain completely and won't come back, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Lord of Eternal Zero nodded, "In the history of the East, less than one-tenth of the other side-level geniuses who left eventually returned, and even if they did, they only came to see it occasionally, and it was not beneficial to the original forces. The main reason is that you are halfway through. And the Lord of Gu Heng and the other deputy mountain lords will definitely fully support the Lord of Gu Xu, not you. The Lord of the Ancient Void joining Wind Tooth Island is more helpful to Gu Heng Mountain than you joining Wind Tooth Island. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

In other words, it was impossible for him to use Gu Heng Mountain to help him break through to the Nine Bone Transformation Realm this time.

However, even if he was cultivated in the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm, he was no less than those Ninth Bone Transformation Realm geniuses on the other side, and he still had hope of joining Fengya Island.

Only by joining Wind Tooth Island can he enter a wider world and hopefully become a more powerful existence.

If you stay in the Eastern Seventy-two Region all the time, a strong person like the Lord of Chaos may be your ultimate achievement, and it will be difficult to make progress.

Although the Lord of Eternal Zero did not give him any help, he told him the specific time when Wind Tooth Island would recruit members.

Three hundred years later, the location is located in an area in the east where it meets the origin of the Black River.

With the time and place, Ye Tian slowly cultivated, and he was not in a hurry to improve his strength.

Anyway, in just three hundred primeval eras, there is no way to improve much strength, and it is useless to be anxious.

Time flies.

Before you know it, three hundred primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian set off from Guheng Mountain and went to the location where Fengya Island recruited members.

And after Ye Tian left.

The Lord of Gu Heng discussed it with the Lord of Eternal Zero.

"The Lord of Endless really wants to join Wind Tooth Island, once he leaves, our Gu Heng Mountain is equivalent to losing a genius of the other side!"

"Mountain Lord, even if the Endless Lord leaves, if he becomes the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm in the future, it will also help our Guheng Mountain!"

"If there is any help, I may not be able to contact him in the future!"

"You can't say that, maybe he will become extremely powerful in the future, and a little benefit to us will be enough to help us rise in Guheng Mountain!"

"I don't expect that, I might as well expect my son to join Stormtooth Island! "

Subsequently, the other deputy mountain lords also left.

The Lord of Eternal Zero sighed.

In fact, I don't blame the Mountain Lord, after all, Ye Tian's time to join Gu Heng Mountain was too short, and the time for many ordinary bone transformation realms to join Gu Heng Mountain was longer than that of the Endless Lord.

Therefore, the mountain lords have no feelings for the Endless Lord.

Now, the Endless Lord has the idea of leaving Guheng Mountain and joining Fengya Island, and they are naturally not very comfortable.

......

After some time, Ye Tian arrived at his destination.

And just when he had just come here, he found that the Lord of Gu Heng had arrived here with the Lord of Gu Void one step ahead, and the speed was even faster than him.

"I've seen the Lord of Gu Heng, I've seen the Lord of Gu Xu!"

Ye Tian greeted.

The Lord of Gu Heng nodded slightly, but he didn't say much.

And as time passed, more and more other level geniuses came here, most of them were nine bone transformation realms, and only a few were eight bone transformation realms.
